groupKey.description: A function that maps a message to a group key. Messages that resolve to the same key are visually grouped (shared avatar, author name, etc.). Use createTimeWindowGroupKey(windowMs) to replicate time-window-based grouping.

slotDescriptions.groupTimestamp:
The timestamp element rendered next to the author name in compact mode.
Only rendered when `variant === 'compact'` and the message has a `createdAt` value.
